rule.description: File ADDED: $(file)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
File MODIFIED: $(file)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
File DELETED: $(file)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
File PERMISSIONS CHANGED: $(file)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
File ownership CHANGED: $(file)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
CRITICAL: Activity detected in Startup Folder: $(file)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
RDP: Successful login from $(win.eventdata.ipAddress) to $(win.eventdata.targetUserName)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
RDP: Failed login attempt for user $(win.eventdata.targetUserName)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
RDP: Brute force attack detected from $(win.eventdata.ipAddress)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
SSH: Successful login from $(srcip) to user $(dstuser)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
SSH: Failed login attempt from $(srcip) for user $(dstuser)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
SSH: Brute force attack detected from $(srcip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
New User Account Created/Enabled: $(win.eventdata.targetUserName)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Security Audit : User Account Attributes Modified: $(win.eventdata.targetUserName)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Security Audit: A user account was Deleted: $(win.eventdata.targetUserName)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
CRITICAL: User $(win.eventdata.targetUserName) was added to the Administrators group!(By: Youssef Mohamed)
PowerShell Encoded Command detected (Obfuscation Attempt)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
PowerShell script dropped in temp folder via PowerShell process: $(win.eventdata.image)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
CRITICAL: PowerShell downloading file via Invoke-WebRequest! URL: $(win.eventdata.commandLine)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
CRITICAL: PowerShell downloading executable file! Possible malware delivery.(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Critical Log Clearing Detected (ID: $(win.system.eventID)) by $(win.eventdata.subjectUserName)$(win.logFileCleared.subjectUserName)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Critical Privilege Attempt: User $(win.eventdata.subjectUserName) tried to use ($(win.eventdata.privilegeList))(By: Youssef Mohamed)
User $(win.eventdata.targetUserName) failed to log in with high privileges.(By: Youssef Mohamed)
CUSTOM: New Removable Media (USB/External Drive) detected on $(win.system.computer)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
File created -> VT Scan Triggered(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Critical - Privilege escalation detected via $(audit.exe)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Critical - Root command execution without login session: $(audit.exe) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: High - Multiple root commands without login session - Possible backdoor(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Critical - Network tool $(audit.exe) executed - Possible reverse shell(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Critical - Scripting language $(audit.exe) with network activity - Possible reverse shell(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: High - Shell binary detected in temporary directory: $(audit.exe)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Critical - Binary executed from /tmp: $(audit.exe) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Critical - Binary executed from /dev/shm: $(audit.exe) - Fileless malware(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: High - Cron configuration modified: $(audit.exe) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: High - Systemd service modified: $(audit.exe) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Critical - User account modified: $(audit.exe) - Possible backdoor(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Critical - Sudoers file modified: $(audit.exe) - Privilege escalation setup(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: High - Password file accessed: $(audit.exe) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Medium - /etc/passwd accessed: $(audit.exe) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: High - /etc/shadow accessed: $(audit.exe) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Medium - Network scanner executed: $(audit.exe) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Medium - Packet sniffer executed: $(audit.exe) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Download tool executed: $(audit.exe) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Multiple download attempts by UID $(audit.uid) - Malware staging(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Critical - Kernel module operation: $(command) - Possible rootkit(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Audit: Critical - Process injection detected (ptrace): $(audit.exe)$(command)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Security: Warning - Single SSH authentication failure from $(srcip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Security: Critical - SSH Brute Force attack detected from IP $(srcip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Security: Critical - SSH login attempt with non-existent user: $(data.srcuser) from $(srcip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Successful SSH login as $(dstuser) from $(srcip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Multiple successful logins for $(dstuser) from $(srcip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Repeated privilege escalation attempts by AUID $(audit.auid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Multiple executions from /tmp by UID $(audit.uid) - Malware campaign(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Critical - Possible Account Takeover: Multiple failed logins followed by success from $(srcip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Medium - After-hours login detected for user $(dstuser) from $(srcip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - Login from high-risk country ($(geoip.country_name)) by user $(dstuser) from IP $(srcip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Critical - Impossible Travel detected for $(dstuser): from $(previous_geoip.country_name) to $(geoip.country_name)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Low - First-time login for user $(dstuser) from new IP $(srcip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - Multiple user accounts accessed from same IP $(srcip) - Possible credential stuffing(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - Sensitive data copy attempt by UID $(audit.uid) using $(audit.exe) - Possible data theft(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Critical - Database dump attempt by user (UID: $(audit.uid)) using $(audit.exe)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Archive creation detected: User: $(dstuser) | Tool: $(command) $(audit.directory.name)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - File copy to USB/removable media detected - Insider data theft risk(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Medium - Cloud sync tool $(audit.exe) executed by UID $(audit.uid) - Data exfiltration risk(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - Access to financial records: $(audit.exe) accessing $(audit.path) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - Database query to payment tables by UID $(audit.uid) - Financial fraud risk(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Medium - Database export to spreadsheet format by UID $(audit.uid) - Data theft indicator(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Critical - Cryptocurrency wallet access: $(audit.path) by $(audit.exe) - Theft risk(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - HR/Employee data accessed by UID $(audit.uid) - Possible insider data theft(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - Customer database accessed by unauthorized UID $(audit.uid) - Insider threat(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - Bulk email sending detected by UID $(audit.uid) - Possible phishing campaign(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Medium - SSH private key access/copy by UID $(audit.uid) - Lateral movement preparation(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Critical - Privilege escalation to modify user accounts by $(dstuser) - Account manipulation(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - Root command execution by regular user (AUID: $(audit.auid)) - Privilege abuse(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Medium - Sudo usage by guest/temporary user $(dstuser) - Policy violation(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - Permission change on critical system file $(audit.path) by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Critical - Reconnaissance followed by data exfiltration by UID $(audit.uid) - Active attack(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Low - Data transfer tool $(audit.exe) used by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Medium - Successful authentication for $(dstuser) from $(srcip) - Monitor for session hijacking(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - Rapid file access by UID $(audit.uid) - Possible automated data harvesting(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Critical - PCI DSS: Access to Cardholder Data Environment by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: High - GDPR: Personal Identifiable Information (PII) accessed by UID $(audit.uid)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Fraud: Critical - SOX: Financial records modified by UID $(audit.uid) - Critical compliance violation(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Auth: High - SSH Login without TTY (Possible automated/tunneling) by $(dstuser)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Auth: High - Multiple sudo commands by AUID $(audit.auid) - Possible privilege exploration(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Auth: High - Interactive shell escalation via sudo by $(dstuser)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Auth: High - Sudo escalation to read tool $(audit.command) - Possible file access abuse(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Auth: High - New user account created: $(audit.acct) by UID $(audit.id)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Auth: Critical - Password changed for privileged account $(audit.acct) by UID $(audit.id)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Auth: High - User account deleted: $(audit.acct) by UID $(audit.id)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Auth: High - Privileged group created: $(audit.acct) by UID $(audit.id)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Auth: High - User added to privileged group $(audit.acct) - Privilege escalation(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: Critical - /etc/shadow modified - Password hashes changed(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: High - /etc/passwd modified - User database changed(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: Critical - Sudoers configuration modified by $(syscheck.uname)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: High - SSH configuration modified by $(syscheck.uname)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: High - System binary modified: $(syscheck.path) - Possible rootkit(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: Critical - Kernel module modified: $(syscheck.path) - Rootkit indicator(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: High - Cron configuration modified by $(syscheck.uname)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: High - Systemd service modified by $(syscheck.uname)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: High - Network configuration modified by $(syscheck.uname)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: High - Financial data directory modified: $(syscheck.path)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: High - Customer data directory modified: $(syscheck.path) - Data breach risk(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: Critical - SUID binary created in temp directory: $(syscheck.path) - Malware indicator(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Integrity: High - Root-owned file created in temp directory: $(syscheck.path)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Network: High - Connection to suspicious port $(local_port)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Network: Critical - Multiple connections to suspicious ports from $(srcip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Network: Critical - Lateral movement tool ($(process)) detected connecting to $(dstip)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Web Attack: XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) attempt detected URL : $(url)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
Local File Inclusion Attempt detected URL : $(url)(By: Youssef Mohamed)
